title: ASGI: request
description: Completion of an HTTP request handled by an ASGI application (FastAPI, Starlette, etc.). Emitted by ASGIHoneybadger middleware.

path.description: Request path from the ASGI scope.

params.description: Parsed query string params. Only present when include_params is enabled in insights_config.

request_id.description: Request ID from event context, if set.
